steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The passage says Brâncuși influenced both minimalism and abstract art, yet his exacting standards meant he produced relatively few pieces. The sentence ends with 'There is thus something of a disparity between ______' — the blank must name two things that are in tension with each other.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'the themes Brâncuși explored and the themes favored by artists he inspired.': The passage does not discuss the themes of artists he inspired — this introduces unsupported information. ✗
  • Choice B — 'Brâncuși's importance to the history of art and his total artistic output.': He was hugely influential (large importance) yet produced few pieces (small output) — this is exactly the disparity the passage sets up. ✓
  • Choice C — 'the nature of much of Brâncuși's work and the abstraction of Bird in Space.': The passage treats Bird in Space as a representative example, not as something at odds with his other work. ✗
  • Choice D — 'Brâncuși's relatively limited productivity and the diversity of his sculptures.': The passage never mentions diversity of sculptures — it emphasizes the same few recurring themes. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
